review_notes: The functions provided are relevant to the control RA-5 (3) as they focus on vulnerability monitoring and scanning within Kubernetes. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but there is room for slight improvement in clarity and consistency. The functions are technically accurate and map well to Kubernetes security controls.
naming_improvements: Consider using 'k8s_admission_vulnerability_scan_on_admission' for consistency with resource naming patterns.
title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning | Breadth and Depth of Coverage
step1_reasoning: The control 'RA-5 (3)' focuses on vulnerability monitoring and scanning, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that images are scanned for vulnerabilities before being deployed. This can be achieved through enabling image vulnerability scanning and using admission controllers to enforce scanning policies. Additionally, setting the image pull policy to 'Always' ensures that the latest image is pulled and scanned.
